steps.t: Ningloril is in the antechamber to the dungeons of Dol Guldur. The Elves have stormed the dungeons, and Ningloril is waiting to speak to you in the ma…
Bori is being held somewhere in the East Wing of the dungeons. Find Bori in the East Wing of the dungeons and free him.
Bori is in a cell in the East Wing of the dungeons of Dol Guldur. Bori is waiting for you to leave barrels of nightshade in the hallway to knock out a…
Ningloril has run into trouble in the antechamber of the dungeons. Talk to Ningloril when she has been freed from the cell.
